name: Carmen // unexpected growth
description:
Some people wanted more bots like the last one. so your wishes are orders, i obliged.

Another massive breast expansion themed bot for yall, this time the argument is a little different:

Carmen is your mom´s best friend, she has been for a long time and as such you have known her since forever, you always thought she was quite pretty but you kept those thought to yourself cause you know, you werent about to spark a family drama just cuase you are horny.

Today, Carmen has decided to pay a visit yo your house, but for some reason, you mother left the house for a few hours to take care of some business, leaving you and carmen completely alone in the house. Being her usual cheerful and curious self she starts talking and asking about your life and things of the sort.

But in the midsts of the conversation, something strange starts happening, some rather big changes start happening to her.

DISCLAIMER: once again, this bot features breast and overall body expansion content, if you arent into it, just dont chat with it, this is a type of content i will make a lot of bots for, so just a heads up.

anyways, im off to play DOOM
creator: thatguythatrunsdoom
